item.title: Military briefing: The US-Israeli strikes and Iran’s retaliation
item.description: American military assets in the region and Gulf oil supplies are vulnerable to attack and Israel is a renewed target

item.description: Think-tank says it should be easier to fire high earners, hold down the minimum wage and hire abroad

item.description: Trump administration holding ‘no discussions’ about using stockpiles to soothe energy markets

item.description: Brokers say cost of cover to increase by as much as 50% after conflict erupts

item.description: Air strikes put nearby oil-producing Gulf Arab countries on edge amid fears of escalation

item.description: From factory jobs and consumer prices, to supply chains and trade flows, we take a visual look at how the global economy has changed in the past year

item.description: The U.S. President can fume all he wants – the Supreme Court has dealt his strategy a fatal blow

item.description: Europe has been pushed to the brink – unstable, broke and impotent. The continent needs to get its act together so we can all have a better tomorrow

item.description: This 21st-century centre of cutting-edge science is also a medieval site of celestial auguries, of miracle cures performed and witnessed

item.description: When shares you own sink, assume that you’re wrong, rather than looking for reasons why you’re right
